name: Roasted Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, vinegar, brown sugar, and pepper in a 9x13 inch glass baking dish.
2. Cut each onion in half lengthwise.
3. Place the onion halves in the baking dish, cut side down.
4. Roast at 400°F for 60-75 minutes, arranging the cut sides up on a serving platter before serving.
5. Season to taste with salt and serve hot.
